$comment: TENMON-ARK automation catalog v1 — conforms to card_schema_v1.json

cards.objective: Define machine-readable card schema, catalog, and DAG for Build Automation OS.
Execute one card at a time: observe, precheck, patch, acceptance, classify.
Fail classification, regression guard, human gate orchestration over runner.
Measure chat.ts complexity metrics without semantic auto-determination.
Deterministic static audit of api/src/routes/chat.ts (regex + brace windows); JSON + markdown reports; runtime unchanged.

patchStrategy.notes: read-only on chat.ts; reports via suite CLI

cards.objective: Static trunk domain map for chat.ts returns and routeReasons (post AUTO_BUILD_CHATTS_AUDIT_SUITE_V1); JSON map + constitution; no chat.ts edits.
Derive single_flight patch plan bundles from audit + trunk map + catalog/DAG; no chat.ts edits.
Emit Cursor patch recipes from patch plan; single_flight; no forbidden path edits.
Convert patch recipes to Cursor task JSON bundles; single_flight; preserve human gate and nextCard.
Single snapshot of git/queue/human-gate/generated artifacts/catalog-DAG/api build/reports; readyForApply gate before auto-build apply; single_flight violation detection; runtime unchanged.

patchStrategy.notes: read-only observation + optional npm build under api/

cards.objective: Pre-PATCH execution gate: merge cursor manifest, workspace observer, queue, human gate; classify executable/blocked/waiting_human_gate/invalid_scope; runtime unchanged.
Convert generated_cursor_tasks + execution gate into apply_<taskId>.json, apply manifest, and Cursor-paste command bundle text; no PATCH execution; runtime unchanged.

patchStrategy.notes: generated apply JSON + txt manifest only

cards.objective: Post-apply replay bundle: git diff, optional build log, supervisor validate, queue, path guard vs catalog card; nextCardEligibility; runtime unchanged.

patchStrategy.notes: read-only replay aggregation; optional npm build via --with-build

cards.objective: Multi-card campaign planner with single_flight, queue/human/execution-gate/replay pointers; JSON+MD reports; no runner execution.
End-to-end summary wiring queue, gates, planner artifacts, applier, replay audit, campaign; --run-next/--run-campaign compat; runtime unchanged.
Split define trunk from chat.ts into chat_refactor/define_trunk_v1.ts; preserve exit contract, routeReason, reply/res.json; single_flight; 1 change = 1 verify.
Reserved: scripture trunk split (TENMON_SCRIPTURE_CANON_V1 / SCRIPTURE_LOCAL_RESOLVER_V4 / continuity). Implement in dedicated change; placeholder keeps DAG continuity.
Continuity trunk split: preempt / follow-up gates in chat_refactor/continuity_trunk_v1.ts; chat.ts wires await + gate only.

patchStrategy.notes: continuity trunk extraction + chat.ts thin wiring

cards.objective: Finalize support/self-diag trunk: brainstem support + selfaware resolution in support_selfdiag_trunk_v1.ts; single_flight.
Finalize general trunk: NATURAL_GENERAL / projector / shrink paths in general_trunk_v1.ts; single_flight.
Finalize infra wrapper trunk: return wiring / synapse / router boundaries in infra_wrapper_trunk_v1.ts; single_flight.
Lock runtime acceptance after mainline trunk FINAL cards: build, supervisor, replay audit scoped to this card, trunk map + exit contract drift bounds.
Sync automation registry/manifests/autopilot/campaign/replay with mainline FINAL completion; no chat.ts edits.
Sync automation catalog/DAG/manifests to mainline trunk FINAL cards; no chat.ts edits on this card.
Static exit contract report for chat.ts (read-only) + lock exit shape via chat_refactor min_diff; not chat.ts body rewrite.
Scan route handlers for duplication patterns (report only).
Extract response finalizer into allowed module; min diff.
Unify reply path wiring under allowedPaths.
Audit wrapper deduplication opportunities.
Audit ledger/synapse callsites (read-only report).
Guard client vite build; client/ only.
Classify and rehome archive/quarantine paths (move-only).
Verify decisionFrame.ku remains object-shaped in outputs (static/heuristic scan).
Smoke hybrid routes; never inject smoke threadId into LLM_CHAT payloads.
Audit GROUNDED doc/pdfPage references; forbid fabrication (report).
Plan-only or sidecar migration; kokuzo_schema.sql human-gated.
Move founder routes to experimental tree (move-only).
Human confirms mainline completed baseline unchanged.
Audit tRPC router contract vs client (report).
Audit memory router boundaries (report).
Detect dist direct-edit drift vs build outputs.
Document clone reproducibility checklist.
Align constitution docs with PDCA Dev Core (docs only).
Human judgement on scripture canon meaning; no auto-determination.
Formalize card queue spine (queueSpineV1 in catalog + DAG edges + scheduler ordering); docs and automation metadata only.
Runner consumes queue snapshot + spine order; execute one runnable card per turn (single_flight); automation only.
Classify automation failures (route/surface/evidence/contract/ui/storage/learning); reports and schema only.
Schema thread-center memory model for scripture continuity (docs + automation artifacts).
Bind thread-center memory into router/composer contracts without runtime rewrite in this card.
Close scripture continuity gaps vs thread center (spec + guards).
Iroha action pattern schema (constitution + automation).
Counsel classifier taxonomy for Iroha routes.
Route map from classifier to counsel handlers (docs/catalog).
KHS total lawgraph manifest and validation hooks.
Bind KHS units/relations to route/evidence contracts.
Bridge deep reasoning prompts to KHS lawgraph (spec).
Katakamuna lineage critique schema.
Modern problem axis mapping for Katakamuna responses.
Bind history-grounded response policy for Katakamuna.
Growth candidate generator spec for canon gaps.
Self-update policy for schema/canon under acceptance gates.
Close the loop: gap -> candidate -> review -> queue (automation/docs).
Stage3: workspace dirty 機械分類、replay/apply-ready 正規化、seal 機械判定の一貫化（観測ランナー）。
Stage1→2→3 を順固定で追従し、未達時は同段再試行・悪化時は rollback 記録・Stage3 で再発時は前段へ戻す親オーケストレーター。

patchStrategy.notes: オーケストレーター本体 + 憲章 + escort reports のみ

queueSpineV1.comment: Post-CHAT_TRUNK_EXIT_CONTRACT_LOCK_V1 spine; queue_scheduler orders eligible cards by this list before lexicographic tie-break.
